subject: Website Samples
value: Mandla is building a portfolio collection of website samples across different industries to demonstrate range in branding, visual systems, layouts, interactions and audience-specific design.

subject: Website Samples
value: Expand the original website-sample portfolio with 50 additional business or creator niches, each paired with an appropriate theme, structure and famous-brand design inspiration.

source.conversation_topic: Expansion from thirteen website samples to fifty additional niches

subject: Website Samples
value: Define the specific brand positioning and world first, then derive the theme, visual language, page structure, photography direction, motion and interactions from that identity. Do not begin from a generic industry template.

source.conversation_topic: Replacing generic AI website generation with authentic brand systems

value.assessment: Mandla considers it mediocre and wants it upgraded after stronger products are polished

subject: Mandla Lee portfolio
value: Polish the strongest real programs and websites first, then rebuild the portfolio around verified case studies, service packages and a clear path to paid enquiries. Do not merely apply a cosmetic redesign to weak proof.

value.warning: Compare with production first because production may contain newer completed fixes

subject: Kingship Christian Centre website
value: Keep `thethrivegeneration` as production and `test` as staging. Compare the repositories, develop and verify changes safely, then move deliberate changes to production without overwriting newer production work.

value.origin: Created as a Cohortly experiment using Kingship as a test subject

source.conversation_topic: Kingship domain and admin subdomain planning

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Frequently uses GitHub Pages for static websites and connects custom domains through DNS and CNAME configuration.

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Prefer browser forms backed by Apps Script or a dedicated backend that write to controlled intake sheets rather than relying only on mailto links or direct master-table writes.

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Websites should be delivered as organised, deployment-ready file structures with HTML pages, shared CSS and JavaScript, favicons, web manifest, robots.txt, sitemap.xml and error pages when relevant.

value.method: Use SiteSucker on macOS to create a private local mirror of the publicly delivered front end.
value.purpose: Study page structure, navigation, responsive behaviour, user journeys, room presentation and public front-end patterns, then apply the lessons through an original replacement platform.
scope_limitations: No private server code, databases, credentials or protected backend access
Do not republish third-party wording, branding, photographs or assets

source.conversation_topic: CampusKey website study and SiteSucker setup
